title: SpatialData
text:
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(SpatialData)
library(SpatialData.data)
library(SpatialData.plot)
library(SingleCellExperiment)


(sd <- JanesickBreastXeniumRep1())

class: SpatialData
- images(2):
  - morphology_focus (1,25778,35416)
  - morphology_mip (1,25778,35416)
- labels(0):
- points(1):
  - transcripts (42638083)
- shapes(2):
  - cell_boundaries (167780,circle)
  - cell_circles (167780,circle)
- tables(1):
  - table (313,167780) [cell_circles]
coordinate systems(2):
- global(5): morphology_focus morphology_mip cell_boundaries
  cell_circles transcripts
- aligned(5): morphology_focus morphology_mip cell_boundaries
  cell_circles transcripts






# bounding box crop
bb <- list(xmin=4e3, xmax=12e3, ymin=8e3, ymax=12e3)
(sp <- crop(sd, bb))

class: SpatialData
- images(2):
  - morphology_focus (1,4000,8000)
  - morphology_mip (1,4000,8000)
- labels(0):
- points(1):
  - transcripts (2147181)
- shapes(2):
  - cell_boundaries (8163,circle)
  - cell_circles (7942,circle)
- tables(1):
  - table (313,167780) [cell_circles]
coordinate systems(2):
- global(5): morphology_focus morphology_mip cell_boundaries
  cell_circles transcripts
- aligned(5): morphology_focus morphology_mip cell_boundaries
  cell_circles transcripts



# TODO: make this better...
i <- "cell_boundaries"
t <- SpatialData::table(sd)
region(t) <- i
table(sp, "tmp") <- t
base::table(getTable(sp, i, "celltype_major"))


          B-cells              CAFs Cancer Epithelial       Endothelial 
               52               722              4448               576 
          Myeloid Normal Epithelial               PVL      Plasmablasts 
              698               572               118                98 
          T-cells 
              879 



plotSpatialData() + 
    plotShape(sp, i, col=NA, fill="transcript_counts") +
    plotPoint(sp, size=0.2, n=2e4, key="EPCAM", col="red") +
    scale_fill_gradientn(colors=hcl.colors(9, "Roma"), trans="log10")

title: SpatialData
text:
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(SpatialData)
library(SpatialData.data)
library(SpatialData.plot)


(sd <- ColorectalCarcinomaMIBITOF())

class: SpatialData
- images(3):
  - point16_image (3,1024,1024)
  - point23_image (3,1024,1024)
  - point8_image (3,1024,1024)
- labels(3):
  - point16_labels (1024,1024)
  - point23_labels (1024,1024)
  - point8_labels (1024,1024)
- points(0):
- shapes(0):
- tables(1):
  - table (36,3309) [point8_labels,point16_labels,point23_labels]
coordinate systems(3):
- point16(2): point16_image point16_labels
- point23(2): point23_image point23_labels
- point8(2): point8_image point8_labels






cl <- rep(list(c(0, 1/3)), 3) # contrasts
ps <- lapply(imageNames(sd), \(i) plotSpatialData() + plotImage(sd, i, cl=cl))
wrap_plots(ps, nrow=1) & theme(legend.position="none")









bb <- list(xmin=0, xmax=800, ymin=200, ymax=500)
(sp <- crop(sd, bb, j="point23")) # TODO: crop() should filter tables

class: SpatialData
- images(1):
  - point23_image (3,300,800)
- labels(1):
  - point23_labels (300,800)
- points(0):
- shapes(0):
- tables(1):
  - table (36,3309) [point8_labels,point16_labels,point23_labels]
coordinate systems(1):
- point23(2): point23_image point23_labels

plotSpatialData() + plotImage(sp, cl=cl) # TODO: auto-drop legend?

title: Contents
text:
Contents

MERFISH Mouse brain (1 section, 268 genes x 2389 cells)
MIBITOF Colorectal carcinoma (3 regions, 36 proteins x 3309 cells)
Xenium Lung cancer (1 section, 313 genes x 167780 cells)
Visium Mouse brain (2 sections, 31053 genes x 6384 spots)

title: SpatialData
text:
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(SpatialData)
library(SpatialData.data)
library(SpatialData.plot)


(sd <- MouseBrainMERFISH())

class: SpatialData
- images(1):
  - rasterized (1,522,575)
- labels(0):
- points(1):
  - single_molecule (3714642)
- shapes(2):
  - anatomical (6,polygon)
  - cells (2389,circle)
- tables(1):
  - table (268,2389) [cells]
coordinate systems(1):
- global(4): rasterized anatomical cells single_molecule






feature_key(p <- point(sd))

[1] "cell_type"

data(p) |>
    distinct(cell_type) |>
    pull(cell_type)

[1] "VISp_II/III"  "VISp_wm"      "VISp_V"       "outside_VISp" "VISp_VI"     
[6] "VISp"         "VISp_I"       "VISp_IV"     

p <- filter(p, cell_type == "VISp_V")
p[sample(length(p), 2e3)]

class: PointFrame
count: 2000 
data(3): cell_type __null_dask_index__ geometry



a <- plotSpatialData() + plotImage(sd)
b <- a + plotPoint(sd, n=2e3, col="cell_type")
c <- a + plotPoint(sd, n=200, key="VISp_V", col="red")
b + c









plotSpatialData() +
    plotImage(sd) + 
    plotShape(sd, linewidth=1, fill=NA, col="white") +   # regions
    plotPoint(sd, size=0.2, n=4e3, colour="cell_type") + # transcripts
    guides(col=guide_legend(override.aes=list(size=2)))









# downsample transcripts for speed
sp <- sd
p <- point(sp)
p <- p[sample(length(p), 2e4)]
point(sp) <- p
# query polygonal region + 10% expansion
s <- shape(sd, "anatomical")
ps <- lapply(seq_along(s), \(.) {
    roi <- st_buffer(st_as_sf(data(s[., ])), 0.1)
    sp <- crop(sp, roi)
    plotSpatialData() +
        plotImage(sp) + ggtitle(paste0("ROI", .)) +
        plotShape(sp, fill=NA, col="gold", size=0.8) +
        plotPoint(sp, i=1, n=2e3, col="turquoise", size=0.2) 
})
wrap_plots(ps, nrow=2) & theme_void() & theme(plot.title=element_text(hjust=0.5))

title: SpatialData
text:
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(SpatialData)
library(SpatialData.data)
library(SpatialData.plot)
library(SingleCellExperiment)


(sd <- MouseBrainVis())

class: SpatialData
- images(4):
  - ST8059048_hires_image (3,2000,1969)
  - ST8059048_lowres_image (3,600,591)
  - ST8059050_hires_image (3,2000,1968)
  - ST8059050_lowres_image (3,600,590)
- labels(0):
- points(0):
- shapes(2):
  - ST8059048 (2987,circle)
  - ST8059050 (3497,circle)
- tables(1):
  - table (31053,6484) [ST8059048,ST8059050]
coordinate systems(2):
- ST8059048(2): ST8059048_hires_image ST8059048
- ST8059050(2): ST8059050_hires_image ST8059050






# TODO: low-res. images miss coordTrans altogether, 
# leading to failure; handle this case or fix data?

# TODO: HnE visualization seems broken; 
# needs fixing in SpatialData.plot

# TODO: 'geom_sf' does not seem to appreciate 
# the difference between fill and color;
# need to fix this in order to overlay

cl <- rep(list(c(0, 1/3)), 3)
plotSpatialData() + plotImage(sd, cl=cl) +
plotSpatialData() + plotShape(sd, colour="pink")









(se <- tables(sd)[[1]])

class: SingleCellExperiment 
dim: 31053 6484 
metadata(0):
assays(1): X
rownames(31053): Xkr4 Gm1992 ... Vmn2r122 CAAA01147332.1

  TTGTTTCCATACAACT-1-1 TTGTTTGTGTAAATTC-1

plotSpatialData() + plotShape(sd, colour="Map2") +

title: SpatialData
text:
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(SpatialData)
library(SpatialData.data)
library(SpatialData.plot)
library(SingleCellExperiment)


(sd <- MouseBrainVis())
